note: Stage-1.5 model-scaling, the 8B point — split out because it needs a memory-reduced run and MAY be infeasible. fp32 8B is ~32GB of weights ALONE (determinism/losslessness forbid bf16/fp16, since decode must bit-exactly replay training), so on a 40GB card it will OOM even here; it wants a >=80GB GPU. Only batch_chunks is dropped (2->1): it affects static speed/memory but NOT static_rate, so max_seq_len stays 4096 to keep the online number comparable to the 1.7B/4B runs. OOM ladder: if it still OOMs, drop max_seq_len to 2048 (note that this breaks strict comparability with the smaller models); if still OOM, 8B needs a bigger card or model-scaling stops at 4B. Everything else is the frozen config, identical to models_text.json.
